title: Marketable Plushies
description: Turns you into a marketable plushie!
body:
![Render](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6452500f040d916ec1d2dcae79d3ac9a01be84ed_0.webp)

# Obtaining Plushies
Plushies are crafted with an armor stand, string, wheat, and a pumpkin. The plushie will be of the skin you are wearing at the time you crafted it. If you have anything that lets you get player heads the player heads will be replaced by plushies.

# Plushie Recipe
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25101d61c290e2264e9c0e44a9d67fea157340a4.png)

# FAQ
### Can I use marketable plushies in my modpack?
Of course! Just don't claim that you made it and the modpack needs to be on modrinth.
### Will you port to x version?
1.20.1 will always be supported and I will try to port to newer versions but it's not a guaranteed. As for other modloaders, maybe.
### I found a bug, where do I report it?
You can report it in the bug reports channel in the support discord: [https://discord.gg/T9cNptzn8z](https://discord.gg/T9cNptzn8z)
